mapper.select: SELECT * FROM film_review WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM film_review WHERE film_id = #{filmId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO film_review (film_id, user_id, title, content, helpful_count, not_helpful_count, reply_count, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{filmId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, 0, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE film_review SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE film_review r SET r.helpful_count = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM film_review_feedback f WHERE f.review_id = #{reviewId} AND f.is_helpful = 1 ), r.not_helpful_count = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM film_review_feedback f WHERE f.review_id = #{reviewId} AND f.is_helpful = 0 ), r.updated_at = NOW() WHERE r.id = #{reviewId}
